name: 15 Original Sachet Box - 8 Pack
description_html:
Whether you were sick of the jitters from the office Keurig or g-ma’s Celestial Seasonings wasn’t quite cutting it, mud gives you the energy and focus in a manner that is jusssst right. With a fraction of the caffeine of coffee mud leans on ayurvedic herbs, adaptogens, and cacao to give you natural energy, focus, and immune support without having to worry about jitters or sleeping at night.

Each individual sachet box contains 15 individual servings of MUD\WTR. Our 8 pack delivers 8 sachet boxes great for samples or individual servings at the office.

name: 30 serving :sweetener & :creamer Bundle
description_html:
If there's one thing we know, it's that life is better in pairs. This was true on Noah's Ark and it's true of our :creamer and :sweetener bundle. It's also true of socks, but look, that's not the point. The point is that bundling saves you cash and cuts down on shipping and fossil fuels.


Our :creamer is made from coconut milk and MCT oil. It's vegan, sugar-free and gluten-free.


And our :sweetener? Thought you'd never ask. Two parts coconut sugar, one part lucuma. With butterscotch and caramel undertones, it's here to bring a little more bliss to your morning ritual. 


Ah, there's my sock!

description_html: Our matcha blend is 100% organic, and made with spices and mushrooms. With just a fraction of the caffeine of coffee, as well as naturally occurring L-theanine, you get energy, focus and immune support, without the jitters, crash or poor sleep.

These mushrooms won't make you trip, but they will support your immunity, energy and mental sharpness, causing you to say stuff like, "Everyone chill the f*ck out—I got this," a little more often. 


What a trip.

name: 90 Serving Mud Bag + 90 Serving Creamer Bag Annual
description_html:
Sign up for the combo annual plan and pay $475 upfront. You'll get a 90-serving bag of mud delivered every 3 months. Our bag is resealable and recyclable and... Yep, that's $1.32 per combo serving.

This saves you $245 had you stuck with the monthly tins so whether you're sipping all day or have roommates breaking into your stash, you might want to join the annual club and stock up while saving some loot.

name: 90 serving Coconut Creamer B2B
description_html:
MUD\WTR's BFF is a coconut milk and MCT creamer, plant-based, vegan, gluten-free. With just a tablespoon in your mud, you get beneficial fats and a silky smooth finish. Think chai mocha: but super-powered. With our 90 serving bag, you can be generous to your mug and your mates. Spread the love.

Trying to get more milk for your buck? Get our bulk creamer bag and you'll be in luck.

  • 90-servings of creamer.
  • Matte white recyclable bag.
  • Shipped in a recyclable box (plastic-free.)

name: 90 serving Coconut Sweetener B2B
description_html:
This is the least bad sweetener money can buy: Two parts coconut sugar, one part lúcuma (pronounced loo-koo-ma). WTF is lúcuma? Only "the Gold of the Incas." To accentuate its butterscotch and caramel undertones, we read it poetry. That's right, we read poetry to an antioxidant-rich fruit. Once it’s weak in the knees (stem) we mill it at low temperatures. Then, we introduce lúcuma to its new best friend: coconut sugar, a real sweetie pie. If you're looking to sweeten your mud, this is a match made in superfood heaven.

  • 90-servings of Coconut Sweetener.
  • Matte white compostable bag.
  • Shipped in a recyclable box (plastic-free.)

Like the environment? We do too! You can expect your sweetener to come in our new compostable bag.

name: MUD Shaker
description_html:
Meet the mud shaker. A 25oz stainless steel shaker equipped to keep your Nourish cool. Your new sidekick for smooth, clump-free shakes. 

Here’s how it works:

  1. Drop the whisk ball (yep, the springy one) into the main bottle.
  2. Add your liquid and your Nourish powder.
  3. Screw the lid on tight—whisk ball still inside.
  4. Shake it like you mean it. The whisk ball moves freely inside, breaking up clumps and blending everything into a smooth, sippable shake.

No tricky attachments. No mystery parts. Just a free-rolling whisk ball doing its thing to make every sip as good as the first.

name: MUD Whip
description_html:
If a spoon could drink mud this would be the result. Meet the mud whip. A stainless steel frother equipped with state of the art technology that makes mixing your mud simple. It's USB rechargeable because disposable batteries suck and with the click of a button, this little whip will spin your mud right round like a record baby, right round round round.

  • 4,000 RPMs.

name: MUDWTR Partner Window Decals (5 x 5)
description_html:
MUD\WTR brand window cling. Reads "Proud Partner of MUD\WTR, A Super Functional Coffee Alternative"

Installation Instructions:
You will need: 

  • Glass Cleaner
  • Application Solution = 32 oz. of water + 3 drops of dishwashing liquid, mixed
  • Rubber Squeegee

Installation:

  1. Clean surface with glass cleaner.
  2. Spray application solution on glass surface.
  3. Remove static cling from backing paper. 
  4. Apply static cling to clean wet surface. The wet surface allows you to move and position the static cling properly. NOTE: Static Window Cling adheres from their sides. 
  5. When it is in position, use a rubber squeegee to remove excess water from between the static cling and surface. The more water you remove, the better. 
  6. Let dry completely for a day or two.

name: Original (30 serving)
description_html:
Whether you were sick of the jitters from the office Keurig or g-ma’s Celestial Seasonings wasn’t quite cutting it, MUD\WTR gives you energy and focus in a manner that is jusssst right. With a fraction of the caffeine of coffee, :rise Cacao leans on ayurvedic herbs, adaptogens, and cacao to give you natural energy, focus, and immune support without having to worry about jitters or sleeping at night.

This 30-serving tin is a monthly supply for many, but get it auto shipped if you're worried about having plenty.

  • 30-serving tin of :rise Cacao.
  • Matte black reusable and recyclable tin.
  • Shipped in a recyclable box (plastic-free.)
  • $1.33-$1.66 per serving.

name: Original (90 serving)
description_html:
MUD\WTR is more than just a vessel for caffeine. With adaptogens like chaga, reishi, lion's mane and cordyceps blended with turmeric, masala chai, and cacao you get all the benefits that coffee promised and then some. With just 1/7th the caffeine as a cup of coffee, you can double down on the benefits and sip a few a day without the guilt.

Whether you're sipping all day or have roommates breaking into your stash, you might want to snag our 90-serving bulk bag and stock up while saving some cash.

  • 90-servings of mud.
  • Matte black recyclable bag.
  • Shipped in a recyclable box (plastic-free.)
  • $1.22-$1.38 per serving.

name: Original 12-Serving Bag - 6 Pack
description_html:
At a low entry-level price point, these 12-serving bags of our OG blend are a great introduction for folks who are new to MUD\WTR and looking to try it without breaking the bank. These bags are not available to consumers online, so grab a 6-pack for a unique in-store offering. 

MSRP $22. Available exclusively to wholesale customers.

name: Original Annual Plan (3 Months Free) + VIP Support
description_html:
Sign up for the annual plan and pay $360 upfront. You'll get a 90-serving bag of mud delivered every 3 months. Our bag is resealable and recyclable and... Yep, that's $1.00 per serving.

This saves you $120 had you stuck with the monthly tin so whether you're sipping all day or have roommates breaking into your stash, you might want to join the annual club and stock up while saving some loot.

name: Original Latte Starter Kit
description_html:
With a fraction of the caffeine found in coffee, :rise Cacao gives you focus, energy and immunity without the jitters, crash or dependency. This drink fuels your morning ritual in a way that would make Spartans smile and Buddha proud.

Taste: Hints of cacao melt into earthy chai and tastes like your mug of hot cocoa met a chai latte and they had a baby. Even more delicious as a latte. Our :creamer is made with coconut milk powder and MCT oil, which gives you a rich and creamy texture without the guilty finish.

This box gives you all the things recommended to start. Includes:

30 servings of :rise Cacao + 30 servings of :creamer
Free USB rechargeable frother
Free Sample and Sticker
